summary: CapyMatch Kanban D&D 6-Point Polish Pass - All 9 features verified. CONFIRMED: (1) Insertion line glow with box-shadow using currentColor, (2) Magnetic 50ms/80ms transition, (3) Pre-drop tension 80ms when over target, (4) Drop scale(0.97) with 280ms cubic-bezier, (5) Column pulse 400ms, (6) Settle animation 1000ms with 4 stages, (7) No CSS containing block regression, (8) CSS cleanup in pipeline-motion.css, (9) Insertion line color/background both set.
critical_code_review_comments: Insertion line glow: box-shadow: 0 0 10px currentColor, 0 0 4px currentColor - CORRECT
Dot endpoints: 7px width/height with box-shadow: 0 0 6px currentColor - CORRECT
Magnetic transition: 50ms ease-out normally, 80ms when isOverTarget - CORRECT
Pre-drop tension: isOverTarget check compares draggingOver !== sourceCol - CORRECT
Drop animation: scale(0.97) with 280ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) - CORRECT
Column pulse: 400ms animation via pulsingColumnId state + kanban-col-pulse class - CORRECT
CSS containing block: scale(1.008) only applies when !draggingFromThisWith - CORRECT
pipeline-motion.css: Duplicate removed, replaced with comment on line 145 - CORRECT
Insertion line divs: Both have background AND color set to col.color for currentColor - CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban D&D 6-point polish pass fully verified. KEY VALUES: (1) Insertion line glow uses currentColor with 10px/4px blur, dots are 7px with 6px glow, opacity 0.6. (2) Magnetic alignment: 50ms normally, 80ms over target. (3) Drop: scale(0.97) 280ms. (4) Column pulse: 400ms kanban-col-pulse. (5) Settle: 1000ms 4-stage keyframe, justDroppedId 1200ms timeout. (6) No teal colors in D&D feedback - confirmed neutral shadows.
